ns0:entry.ns0:title: Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
Language: typescript
Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
Language: typescript
A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EveryInc/compound-engineering-plugin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EveryInc/compound-engineering-plugin
Language: typescript
Official Compound Engineering plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lum1104/Understand-Anything
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lum1104/Understand-Anything
Language: typescript
Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MHSanaei/3x-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MHSanaei/3x-ui
Language: typescript
Xray panel supporting multi-protocol multi-user expire day & traffic & IP limit (Vmess, Vless, Trojan, ShadowSocks, Wireguard, Hysteria, Tunnel, Mixed, HTTP, Tun)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Open-Dev-Society/OpenStock
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Open-Dev-Society/OpenStock
Language: typescript
OpenStock is an open-source alternative to expensive market platforms. Track real-time prices, set personalized alerts, and explore detailed company insights — built openly, for everyone, forever free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bia-pain-bache/BPB-Worker-Panel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bia-pain-bache/BPB-Worker-Panel
Language: typescript
A GUI Panel providing Worker subscriptions for VLESS, Trojan and Warp configs alongside a private DoH server and chain proxies, offering full DNS, clean IP, Fragment, Warp, Warp pro and routing settings for cross-platform clients using Amnezia, Wireguard, Sing-box, Clash/Mihomo and Xray cores.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: can1357/oh-my-pi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/can1357/oh-my-pi
Language: typescript
⌥ AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: colbymchenry/codegraph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/colbymchenry/codegraph
Language: typescript
Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, OpenCode, AntiGravity, Kiro, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cursor/plugins
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cursor/plugins
Language: typescript
Cursor plugin specification and official plugins

ns0:entry.ns0:title: earendil-works/pi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/earendil-works/pi
Language: typescript
AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kil0bit-kb/scrcpy-gui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kil0bit-kb/scrcpy-gui
Language: typescript
A modern, high-performance GUI for the scrcpy

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moeru-ai/airi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi
Language: typescript
💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stablyai/orca
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stablyai/orca
Language: typescript
Orca is the next-gen IDE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: supermemoryai/supermemory
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/supermemoryai/supermemory
Language: typescript
Memory engine and app that is extremely fast, scalable. The Memory API for the AI era.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: twentyhq/twenty
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/twentyhq/twenty
Language: typescript
The open alternative to Salesforce, designed for AI.
